thesis: Analysts are upgrading ONGC while it screens cheaper than peers; a liquid way to express the momentum-led revision tilt without micro-cap risk.
falsification: Revisions roll over (ARM fades below mid) or crude/realisations weaken and the stock underperforms NIFTY 500 over 3 months.

thesis: Upgrading estimates and slight value tilt on a liquid materials name diversify my book away from financials/consumer.
falsification: Iron-ore/steel demand softens, revisions turn down, and NMDC lags the benchmark over the next quarter.

thesis: LIC's analyst sentiment is improving from a low base with a valuation cushion; structural under-penetration of life insurance.
falsification: Embedded-value growth disappoints, revisions reverse, and the stock underperforms over 3-6 months.

thesis: Improving estimates across its cement/VSF/paints complex; a liquid mid/large name to carry the revision tilt.
falsification: Paints/cement margins compress, revisions fade, and Grasim trails the benchmark.

thesis: A genuine revision turn on a market-leading paints franchise after a derating; quality at an inflection.
falsification: Competitive intensity keeps compressing margins, revisions stall, and the stock underperforms over a quarter.

thesis: Gold-loan tailwind with upgrading estimates; a liquid mid-cap financial diversifier.
falsification: Gold-price/AUM growth disappoints or regulation bites, revisions reverse, underperformance over 3 months.

thesis: Estimate upgrades on a recovering injectables franchise add liquid healthcare beta with a revision tailwind.
falsification: US injectables pricing/approvals disappoint, revisions fade, and the stock lags.

thesis: Order-book-driven upgrades on a high-quality industrial; defence/mining capex tailwind.
falsification: Order inflow slows, revisions stall, valuation (already rich) derates and it underperforms.

thesis: Conservative high-quality franchise; keep a measured weight.
